name: Error Recovery
description: Agent encounters a deliberate tool failure mid-execution and must recover using its persisted state. Tests state persistence across failures and retry logic.
researchContext: Demonstrates the core advantage of stateful architecture: the agent can resume from the last successful step after an error, rather than restarting from scratch.

tools.name: sql_query
tools.description: Execute SQL against the database. Input: {"query": "<SQL>"}. May return an error on first invocation.

tools.name: retry_with_fallback
tools.description: Retry the last failed operation with a fallback strategy. Input: {"originalAction": "<tool>", "fallbackQuery": "<SQL>"}.

tools.name: erp_push
tools.description: Push data to the ERP system. Input: {"payload": [...]}.

initialContext: Fetch the top-5 overdue invoices from the database (status='overdue', sorted by amount DESC) and push them to the ERP collection system. Handle any database errors gracefully.

sql_query_attempt_1.message: Database connection timeout: host db.internal:5432 unreachable after 30s

expectedFinalAnswer: 5 overdue invoices have been successfully pushed to the ERP collection system.
